title: dbHiMo: a web-based epigenomics platform for histone-modifying enzymes.
author: Choi J Kim KT Huh A Kwon S Hong C Asiegbu FO Jeon J Lee YH
content: S-EPMC4460409 PMC4460409 dbHiMo: a web-based epigenomics platform for histone-modifying enzymes.
